title: Software Update - Headset and all other components are up to date - UI
scenario: Software Update tab in Device Settings shows correct component entries and "up to date" status for headset, charge stand, and charge case
steps: Tap on a connected device (headset, earbuds, or headset with charge stand)
Observe the list of components displayed
expected: The Software Update tab displays each component with its device image, name, an "up to date" message, and the current firmware version. For single headsets, one entry (headset) is shown. For headsets with a charge stand, two entries (headset + stand) are shown. For earbuds with a charge case, two entries (earbuds + case) are shown.
